content:
Welcome back! 👋 Great to see you working on **Managed Agents POC** — a focused, hands-on exploration of Claude's managed agents using the quickstart docs as your guide.

You're at **step 1 of 3 (Concept)**, so your next move is to **flesh out your concept and lock in the scope** before diving into implementation. Think about which quickstart example you want to follow, what the agent should do, and any key decisions like tools or workflows you want to demonstrate.

Since this is intentionally bare-bones, keep it tight — the goal is a **working proof of concept**, not a polished product. Let's get building! 🚀
Generated development successfully! Review them above and continue when ready.
Autopilot started. Beginning from step 2: Development
**Executing all 2 pending sprints sequentially — Sprint 1 scaffolds the project and sets up the Claude SDK, Sprint 2 implements the managed agent core loop and CLI interface.**
